subject: A red-robed pyromancer standing with arms outstretched, conjuring a churning vortex of embers and flame in front of them inside a forge.
description: A figure in a deep crimson hooded robe stands with their back partially turned to the viewer, arms raised and outstretched as they channel a swirling vortex of fire and glowing embers. The vortex twists upward like a tornado of sparks, dominating the center of the composition. Behind and around the caster, the chamber glows orange with the light of an open furnace or forge — heavy stone arches and hanging lantern-like fixtures frame the scene. Everything is bathed in red-orange firelight; the mage is silhouetted against their own conjured flames, with their robe billowing slightly from the heat. The atmosphere is intense, focused, and elemental.
foreground: robed pyromancer with arms raised conjuring a tornado of embers and flame
background: stone-arched forge interior glowing with furnace light and floating sparks
emotion: intense focus, channeling power, body braced against the heat of their own spell
